narrative:
Mt Pleasant Twp township has 1,445 registered voters, with 58.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.5%, a clear Democratic lean of 9.9 percentage points.
